title: tagma #5001
definition:
1) that which has been arranged, thing placed in order
 2) a body of soldiers, a corps
 3) band, troop, class
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) that which has been arranged, thing placed in order
 2) a body of soldiers, a corps
 3) band, troop, class

    NASB:  that which has been arranged in order, spec. a division, rank:
